executives.name: Mark Bristow
executives.background: Mark Bristow was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of Barrick in January 2019 following the merger with Randgold Resources. He was previously the founder and CEO of Randgold Resources since its inception in 1995. He holds a PhD in Geology from the University of Natal, South Africa.

executives.name: Graham Shuttleworth
executives.background: Graham Shuttleworth was appointed Senior Executive Vice-President and Chief Financial Officer of Barrick in January 2019. He previously served as the CFO of Randgold Resources from 2007 until the merger. He is a Chartered Accountant.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Executive Vice-President, Chief Financial Officer
Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Grant Beringer
executives.background: Grant Beringer is the Group Sustainability Executive. He joined Barrick in January 2019 from Randgold, where he was the Group Environmental Coordinator.

executives.name: Mark Hill
executives.background: Mark Hill is the Chief Operating Officer for Latin America and Asia Pacific. He joined Barrick in 2019 and has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Operating Officer, Latin America and Asia Pacific

executives.name: Sebastiaan Bock
executives.background: Sebastiaan Bock is the Chief Operating Officer for Africa and the Middle East. He was previously the Senior Vice President, Chief Financial Officer for the Africa and Middle East region.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Operating Officer, Africa and Middle East
Senior Vice President / CFO - Africa & Middle East

executives.name: Ammar Al-Joundi
executives.background: Mr. Al-Joundi was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of Agnico Eagle in February 2022. He previously served as President from 2015 to 2022 and as Chief Financial Officer from 2010 to 2012 and 2015. He has over 20 years of experience in finance and business strategy in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Andrew Quinn
executives.background: Andrew Quinn was formerly Head of Mining Investment Banking for Europe and Africa at CIBC.

executives.name: Bill MacNevin
executives.background: Mr. MacNevin was appointed Executive Vice President, Operations and Sustainability in 2023. He has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles at Newmont and Barrick Gold.

executives.name: Brian Greenspun
executives.background: Brian Greenspun is the Chairman and CEO of Greenspun Media Group and has been a director of Barrick since 2014.

executives.name: Christopher Hill
executives.background: Mr. Hill has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, primarily in financial and corporate development roles. He was previously Treasurer of Kinross Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Dambisa Moyo
executives.background: Co-principal of Versaca Investments. Director since 2016.

executives.name: Gregory Lang
executives.background: Mr. Lang has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining NOVAGOLD, he served as President of Barrick Gold North America. He has held various senior executive positions at Barrick Gold Corporation and Homestake Mining Company.

tenure_dates.title: President, Barrick Gold North America; Managing Director, Barrick Gold Australia; Vice President, Australian Operations

executives.name: Helen Hardy
executives.background: Helen Hardy is an independent director. She has extensive experience in the energy sector, having served as Company Secretary of Origin Energy Limited.

executives.name: Igor Gonzales
executives.background: Mr. Gonzales was formerly the COO of Buenaventura and Barrick Gold. He has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Joe Dick
executives.background: Joe Dick has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer at Eldorado before transitioning to a strategic role.

executives.name: John Thornton
executives.background: Executive Chairman, Barrick Gold Corporation; Former President, Goldman Sachs.

executives.name: Kelvin Dushnisky
executives.background: Mr. Dushnisky was the CEO of AngloGold Ashanti Ltd. and President of Barrick Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Loretta Marshall
executives.background: Loretta Marshall is a senior executive with experience in finance and corporate governance.

executives.name: Johan van Jaarsveld
executives.background: Johan van Jaarsveld was appointed Chief Technical Officer in September 2024. He previously served as Chief Development Officer and has a background in investment banking and resources strategy.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Strategic Business Development

board_of_directors.name: John Thornton
board_of_directors.background: John Thornton is the Executive Chairman of Barrick. He is also the Chairman of PineBridge Investments and a professor at Tsinghua University. He was formerly the President of Goldman Sachs.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Bristow
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Barrick. Former CEO of Randgold Resources.

board_of_directors.name: Helen Hardy
board_of_directors.background: Helen Hardy is an independent director. She has extensive experience in the energy sector, having served as Company Secretary of Origin Energy Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Brian Greenspun
board_of_directors.background: Brian Greenspun is the Chairman and CEO of Greenspun Media Group and has been a director of Barrick since 2014.

board_of_directors.name: Brett Harvey
board_of_directors.background: Brett Harvey is the Lead Independent Director. He was formerly the Chairman and CEO of CONSOL Energy Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Andrew Quinn
board_of_directors.background: Andrew Quinn was formerly Head of Mining Investment Banking for Europe and Africa at CIBC.

board_of_directors.name: Loretta Marshall
board_of_directors.background: Loretta Marshall is a senior executive with experience in finance and corporate governance.

board_of_directors.name: Dambisa Moyo
board_of_directors.background: Co-principal of Versaca Investments. Director since 2016.

board_of_directors.name: Gregory Lang
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Lang has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining NOVAGOLD, he served as President of Barrick Gold North America. He has held various senior executive positions at Barrick Gold Corporation and Homestake Mining Company.

tenure_dates.title: President, Barrick Gold North America; Managing Director, Barrick Gold Australia; Vice President, Australian Operations

board_of_directors.name: Kelvin Dushnisky
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Dushnisky was the CEO of AngloGold Ashanti Ltd. and President of Barrick Gold Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Chris Woodall
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Woodall has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior operational roles at Goldcorp and Barrick Gold.

sources.source_description: Barrick Gold Corporation Management Information Circular (Form 6-K)
